title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Automated Feature Selection INFS3822
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity – Automated Feature Selection Pre-requisites Please complete all Week 5 Pre-Seminar Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section. Please complete the following in-class activities: o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Upload Data to SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Exploration o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Transformation

Step by step guide Open your project on SAS Viya Model Studio. Please refer to Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya to create a project). Once your project is open, click on the Pipelines tab. Then, add a Variable Selection node to the Imputation node.

CRICOS Provider Code 00098G

Select “Fast Supervised Selection”. Please note that you can access SAS documentation any time directly from the interface by clicking the icon

SAS documentation

Open the Variable Selection results

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Variable Selection node.
